content:
守密人你好：
       彌薩格大學校務處將於4月21日22:50進行校內設施修復，更新完成後您將得到通知，重新進入遊戲。對於更新可能給大家帶來的不便，我們會準備一份補給物資以示歉意。祝大家調查順利！ 
  
【補給物資】
在線維護補償：銀芯*50
  
【領取條件】
領取時間截至2025年5月5日23:59。請記得及時前往郵箱領取補給物資哦。  
 
【更新內容】
● 修復了試玩「分裂患者·混沌」中「24」狂氣爆發沒有傷害的問題。
● 修復了「星辰篇」中戰鬥勝利，小概率可能觸發重復進入戰鬥的問題。
● 修復了「多重療愈·複刻」中記憶編碼介面文本偏移的問題。
● 修復了「星辰篇」2-4章節的劇情文本中的錯別字。
● 修復了多語言翻譯版本中，創建角色文本「您的名字」顯示不全的問題。
●  修復了鑰令「酒館之門」在調查編隊中錯誤的文本描述。

V2.2.0.4 Online Maintenance Notice
Dear Keeper,
    The Mythag University Administration Office will conduct facility repairs on April 21 at 22:50(UTC+8). You will be notified once the update is complete and can re-enter the game. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will provide a supply package as compensation. Happy investigating!
    
【Supply Package】
Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
    
【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on May 5 2025(UTC+8), at 23:59. Please remember to check your mailbox to claim the supply package.
     
【Update Content】
● Fixed the issue in the demo "Split Patient: Chaos" where "24" Aliemus Exalt did not deal damage.  
● Fixed the issue in "Star Chapter" where winning a battle could occasionally trigger a repeat battle.  
● Fixed the text misalignment in the memory encoding interface of "Multiple Healing: Remake".  
● Corrected typos in the storyline text of "Star Chapter" Chapter 2-4.  
● Fixed the issue in multilingual versions where the character creation text "Your Name" was not fully displayed.  
● Fixed the incorrect text description of the Posse "Tavern Door" in the investigation team lineup.
